title: Karmanghat Hanuman Temple
tagline: Karmanghat Hanuman Temple — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: The Karmanghat Hanuman Temple is a Hindu temple in Hyderabad in the state of Telangana, India.
overview.description: The Karmanghat Hanuman Temple is a Hindu temple in Hyderabad in the state of Telangana, India. The presiding deity of the temple is Hanuman as Dhyana Anjaneya. The temple complex also houses other deities viz. Rama, Shiva, Saraswati, Durga, Santoshimata, Venugopala, and Jagannath.

topPlaces.name: Bairamalguda
topPlaces.description: Bairamalguda is a locality in Hyderabad, Telangana, India.

topPlaces.name: Saroornagar
topPlaces.description: Saroornagar is a neighbourhood in Hyderabad. It is located in the Rangareddy district of Indian state of Telangana.

topPlaces.name: Paigah Tombs
topPlaces.description: Paigah Tombs or Maqbara Shams al-Umara, are the tombs belonging to the nobility of Paigah family, who were fierce loyalists of the Nizams, served as statespeople, philanthropists and generals under and alongside them. The Paigah tombs are among the major wonders of Hyderabad State which are known for their architectural excellence as shown in their laid mosaic tiles and craftsmanship.

topPlaces.name: Meerpet–Jillelguda
topPlaces.description: Meerpet–Jillelguda was a satellite city of Hyderabad and is now part of Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation and is in Rangareddy district of the Indian state of Telangana.

topPlaces.name: Santoshnagar
topPlaces.description: Santosh Nagar Colony, or Santoshnagar Colony, is a residential and commercial area in Hyderabad, India. It is located near Saidabad in the Old City of Hyderabad and DRDO laboratories.

topPlaces.name: Saidabad
topPlaces.description: Saidabad is a mandal in Hyderabad District in Telangana, India.

topPlaces.name: Pisal Banda
topPlaces.description: Phisal Banda is a neighbourhood near Santoshnagar neighbourhood in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is well known for being the site of the historic Paigah Tombs and Phisal Banda Palace of Nawab Zafar Jung Bahadur of Khursheed Jahi Paigah, a rich nobleman and amateur astronomer in Hyderabad, who bought a 6-inch telescope from England in 1901.

topPlaces.name: Saroornagar Indoor Arena
topPlaces.description: Saroornagar Indoor Stadium is an indoor sporting arena located in Hyderabad, India. The capacity of the arena is 2,000 people.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Karmanghat Hanuman Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Karmanghat Hanuman Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Karmanghat Hanuman Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (15 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (6 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Karmanghat Hanuman Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Karmanghat Hanuman Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Karmanghat Hanuman Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Karmanghat Hanuman Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Karmanghat Hanuman Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bairamalguda, Saroornagar, Paigah Tombs, Meerpet–Jillelguda, Santoshnagar.
